  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    org.atmosphere.config.managed.ManagedAtmosphereHandler.Managed
    Use RawMessage instead.
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    org.atmosphere.config.managed.ManagedAtmosphereHandler.Managed
    Use RawMessage instead.
    org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereRequestImpl.NoOpsRequest
    Use NoOpsRequest directly instead.
  • Deprecated Enum Classes
    Enum Class
    Description
    org.atmosphere.config.service.Ready.DELIVER_TO
     
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    org.atmosphere.config.service.Ready.value()
     
    org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereFramework.interceptor(Class<T>)
    Use AtmosphereFramework.findInterceptor(Class) which returns Optional instead of null.
    org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereRequest.Builder.isSSecure(boolean)
    org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereRequestImpl.Builder.isSSecure(boolean)
    org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereResourceFactory.find(String)
    Use AtmosphereResourceFactory.findResource(String) which returns Optional instead of null.
    org.atmosphere.cpr.BroadcasterFactory.lookup(Object)
    Use BroadcasterFactory.findBroadcaster(Object) which returns Optional instead of null.
    org.atmosphere.cpr.DefaultAtmosphereResourceFactory.find(String)
    Use DefaultAtmosphereResourceFactory.findResource(String) which returns Optional instead of null.
    org.atmosphere.cpr.InterceptorRegistry.interceptor(Class<T>)
    Use InterceptorRegistry.findInterceptor(Class) which returns Optional instead of null.
    org.atmosphere.websocket.DefaultWebSocketFactory.find(String)
    org.atmosphere.websocket.WebSocketFactory.find(String)
    Use WebSocketFactory.findWebSocket(String) which returns Optional instead of null.

    Constructor
    Description
    org.atmosphere.cpr.AtmosphereResourceImpl(AtmosphereConfig, Broadcaster, AtmosphereRequest, AtmosphereResponse, AsyncSupport<AtmosphereResourceImpl>, AtmosphereHandler)
